violations.text: Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Upstairs dishwasher is not in good repair. Leak observed. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for to have a Rhode Island Food Safety Manager. Establishment employs individuals with food safety manager certification but there is not active RIFMC. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood vents have an accumulation of debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

The mechanical high temp dishwasher was observed with the conveyor systems off track causing dish machine to empty. Establishment is to move dish wash operation to 3 bay sink until machine is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The receptacle in the all gender toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The mechanical dish machine located in the upstairs kitchen was not in good repair. The machine was observed with a slow leak dripping onto the floor. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
The floor in the downstairs kitchen area was observed damaged by the walk in refrigerator. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris. Hood systems must be maintained. System is scheduled for service this month. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Establishment is to store cleaned and sanitized dishes at the salad and breakfast bar inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood above the steam cooker have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
The condensate from the steam oven unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
